title: platystemon linearis
intro: Platystemon linearis, also known as the wind poppy or California wind poppy, is a rare, annual flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Platystemon linearis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Platystemon linearis can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by using it as a tincture.
